heading: Omitted
label: 788h Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized the prescription of rules and regulations to carry out the provisions of former sections 788e to 788h of this title, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–506, § 482 Stat. 859Sept. 21, 1968
